layout_and_spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers to prevent text collision
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for Dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout, visible 1px borders (border-border). Dashboard Cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp or max 8px radius. High contrast hover states (e.g. hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
components.timer_hero: Prominent, sticky or floating top/bottom bar for the active timer. Must use Primary color (Red) when active, neutral when stopped.
components.voice_command: Floating Action Button (FAB) or prominent center bottom navigation icon. Must include 'pulse' animation (ring/drop-shadow) when actively listening. Needs visual text fallback (toast) to confirm recognized command.
components.forms: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Select, but heavily customized. Use 1px borders and flat backgrounds.
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned, sticky headers for client/project CRUD. No generic card wrappers.
components.charts: Shadcn chart components (Recharts). Minimalist grid lines, use primary contrast colors.
components.navigation: Collapsible sidebar on desktop (left side). Bottom navigation or hamburger on mobile. Must include Dark/Light mode toggle.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md). Text colors must be explicitly defined on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition-transform duration-200 ease, opacity 0.2s ease).
motion_and_interactions.voice_pulse: Continuous soft pulse drop-shadow for active microphone.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings for keyboard navigation.

login_bg_dark.description: Background texture for the login screen in dark mode.

login_bg_light.description: Background texture for the login screen in light mode.

avatar.description: Default avatar for the user profile.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='start-timer-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Shadcn UI and tailwind to build a hybrid_fullstack React + FastAPI time-tracking app.
Implement light/dark mode toggle using Tailwind's 'dark:' classes. Follow the provided color palette.
Create the authentication flow. Use the provided login background images depending on the active theme.
Implement CRUD operations for Clients (including hourly rate) and Projects (linked to clients).
Build the core Time Tracker feature. Create a prominent sticky timer widget that can be toggled manually.
Implement Web Speech API for voice commands (e.g., 'Firma Orca, Projekt Vertrieb, Arbeitszeit beginnt jetzt!'). Show a pulsing visual indicator when listening and a toast upon successful parsing.
Build the Dashboard using the 'Control Room' bento grid pattern. Include time per client/project, hourly rate calculation, and total billing summary.
Implement a CSV Export feature for selected date ranges/projects.
Build a daily timeline view listing all time entries for the selected date.
Ensure the UI is responsive (mobile-first), replacing the desktop sidebar with a bottom or hamburger menu on small screens.
Apply data-testid attributes extensively to facilitate E2E testing.
